zh.Stanthorne, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾斯坦東恩
zh.Stanthorne, Cheshire, England, United Ki: 英國英格蘭爾斯坦東恩
zh.Stanthorne, Chesire, England: 英國英格蘭爾斯坦東恩
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Cotton於1350年出生在英國英格蘭爾時，她的父親Thomas Cotton67歲，母親Cicely Lostock63歲。她於1378年與John Heth在英國英格蘭爾斯坦東恩結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於從1381年到1398年在英國英格蘭爾斯坦東恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Cotton于1350年出生在英国英格兰爾时，她的父亲Thomas Cotton67岁，母亲Cicely Lostock63岁。她于1378年与John Heth在英国英格兰爾斯坦東恩结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于从1381年到1398年在英国英格兰爾斯坦東恩。

nameMeanings.name: Cotton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called from Old English (æt) cotum (dative plural of cot) ‘at the cottages or huts’ (or sometimes possibly from a Middle English plural, coten). Examples include Coton (Cambridgeshire, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire), Cottam (East Yorkshire, Lancashire, Nottinghamshire), and Cotham (Nottinghamshire). Particularly common in Staffordshire.
French: from a pet form of the personal name Nicolas (see Nicholas ), derived via Nicot, or of the personal name Jacques , derived via Jacot.
History: John Cotton (1584–1652) was a noted Puritan preacher, who landed at Boston, MA, from London in 1633 and became leader of the Congregationalists in America.

variants.name: Cotten
meanings: Altered form of German Kotten, a habitational name from any of several places so named in Rhineland, Westphalia, Silesia, etc., or perhaps an American shortened form of composite German surnames such as Kottenhagen, Kottenhoff, Kottenkamp (see Koth ).

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: English (southwestern England and south Wales) and Dutch: from the personal name Nicholas (from Latin Nicolaus, from Greek Nikolaos, from nikān ‘to conquer’ + laos ‘people’). Forms with -ch- are due to hypercorrection (compare Anthony ). The name in various vernacular forms was popular among Christians throughout Europe in the Middle Ages, largely as a result of the fame of a 4th-century Lycian bishop, about whom a large number of legends grew up, and who was venerated in the Orthodox Church as well as the Catholic. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Croatian and Serbian Nikolić (see Nikolic ), Greek Papanikolaou ‘(son of) Nicholas the priest’ and Nikolopoulos . Compare Nickolas .

History: The colonial official and revolutionary patriot Robert Carter Nicholas was from a prominent VA family on both sides. His father was a British navy surgeon who emigrated c. 1700 from Lancashire, England, to Williamsburg, VA.

variants.name: Cotham
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Cotton  .

variants.name: Cottam
meanings: English (Midlands and northern England): variant of   Cotton  .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Cotton was born in 1350, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Cotton, was 67 and her mother, Cicely Lostock, was 63. She married John Heth in 1378, in Stanthorne, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died from 1381 to 1398, in Stanthorne, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Cotton est née en 1350, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Cotton, avait 67 ans et sa mère, Cicely Lostock, avait 63 ans. Elle a épousé John Heth en 1378, à Stanthorne, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée du 1381 au 1398, à Stanthorne, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Cotton 1350 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Cotton 67 und ihre Mutter Cicely Lostock 63. Sie hat 1378 in Stanthorne, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom John Heth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb von 1381 bis 1398 in Stanthorne, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Cotton è nata il nel 1350 nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Cotton, aveva 67 anni e sua madre, Cicely Lostock, aveva 63 anni. Lei sposato John Heth nel 1378, nel Stanthorne, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì da 1381 a 1398, nel Stanthorne, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Cottonが1350年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Cottonは67歳，母Cicely Lostockは63歳であった。1378年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアスタンソルンでJohn Hethと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女はから1381年まで1398年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアスタンソルンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Cotton(이)가 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Cotton(은)는 67세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cicely Lostock(은)는 63세였다. 그녀는 1378년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 스탠토른에서 John Heth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1381년 부터 1398년 까지 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 스탠토른에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Cotton родилась в 1350 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Cotton было 67 лет, а матери, которую звали Cicely Lostock, 63. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Heth в 1378 г. в местности стантаурн, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла с 1381 по 1398 в местности стантаурн, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
